title: Flock Transparency Review - Morgan County, AL

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Alabama Open Records Law, I hereby request the following records:

Reports relating to your agency's use of Flock, and the sharing of Flock data with other agencies. Specifically, we are requesting two standard reports from within the Flock system: 

1. Organization Audit in Flock.
Per Flock's documentation, the Organization Audit is available within the Insights tab and is defined as searches done within the agency.

2. Network Audit in Flock.
Per Flock's documentation, the Network Audit is available within the Insights tab and is defined as searches of the organization’s Flock network by any agency in the Flock System.
-
The above to searches within Flock should result in the ability to download Excel files in one of the following formats: .csv or .xls or .xlsx. Please search for the following timeframe: 1/1/2025 through 3/27/2026.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

André Natta, a citizen of Alabama, in coordination with Alan J. Segal.
